description: Common bloatware on Huawei / Honor devices (EMUI / HarmonyOS)

packages.name: AppGallery
packages.description: Huawei app store. Safe to remove if using Google Play.

packages.name: Huawei Health
packages.description: Fitness and health app. Required for Band/Watch pairing.

packages.name: Huawei Browser
packages.description: Huawei web browser. Substitute: Chrome, Firefox.

packages.name: HiSearch
packages.description: Huawei intelligent search service. Collects usage data.

packages.name: Celia (Huawei Assistant)
packages.description: Huawei voice assistant. Substitute: Google Assistant.

packages.name: Huawei Update Center
packages.description: OTA update service. Removing disables system updates.

packages.name: Phone Manager (Huawei)
packages.description: Core Huawei system manager. Removal may break system features.
